summary: Executive creative leader with 20 years building bold visual stories, pitching ambitious work, and translating creative vision into production reality. Led global teams across film, advertising, immersive media, and real-time experiences, with a track record of aligning creative ambition, technical feasibility, timelines, and budget. Strong fit for Active Theory's outward-facing Executive Creative Director role across new business, concept leadership, and high-end digital experience work.

bullets: Advise founders, studio heads, and creative leaders on immersive concepts, AI-enabled workflows, creative operations, and scalable production systems.
Develop mission-aligned concepts, campaigns, and experience narratives across immersive, XR, and emerging-platform work.
Help leaders balance creative ambition with team structure, workflow design, and practical delivery constraints.
Led creative and technical direction for a holographic display platform, shaping immersive launch experiences, real-time prototypes, and scalable content pipelines.
Partnered with product, engineering, and marketing to translate complex technology into audience-ready stories and partner-facing narratives.
Conceptualized and directed experiences combining real-time avatars, XR performance, live capture, and spatial media for enterprise audiences.
Led integrated campaign work across film, digital, social, and experiential platforms for global brands including Apple, Samsung, BMW, and Microsoft.
Directed concurrent productions with teams ranging from 2 to 300+ artists across multiple countries while balancing quality, schedule, and cost.
Worked closely with directors, agencies, production, and executive stakeholders to align vision and execution under demanding timelines.
Directed 20 CG leaders and global teams of 150+ artists across film, streaming, games, and real-time content.
Built next-generation CG pipelines and planning tools that improved delivery predictability without sacrificing creative standards.
Advanced original IP initiatives across $500K-$8M productions, aligning design ambition, production reality, and stakeholder priorities.

projects.name: Goosebumps VR Experience
projects.description: Led early immersive production work, including the VES-nominated Goosebumps VR experience.

projects.name: Samsung — Ostrich
projects.description: Contributed to a globally recognized campaign blending strong concepting with production-grade execution.

projects.name: Light Field Lab Real-Time Experiences
projects.description: Directed launch experiences that translated frontier technology into memorable audience-facing work.

skills.items: Executive Creative Direction, Creative Team Leadership, Stakeholder Alignment, Client Partnership, Quality & Taste Leadership
Immersive Media, Brand Storytelling, Communications Campaigns, Event & Keynote Visuals, Digital Content
Real-Time Rendering, Unreal Engine, XR, AI-Assisted Creative Workflows, Global Team Workflows, Production Systems
